description.en: Use when a user wants to deploy a new smart contract from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal for deploying from an existing contract's source code.
description.de: Use when a user wants to deploy a new smart contract from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal for deploying from an existing contract's source code.
description.es: Use when a user wants to deploy a new smart contract from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal for deploying from an existing contract's source code.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to deploy a new smart contract from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal for deploying from an existing contract's source code.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to deploy a new smart contract from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal for deploying from an existing contract's source code.
description.it: Use when a user wants to deploy a new smart contract from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal for deploying from an existing contract's source code.

inputs.name: EGLD Amount
inputs.description: The amount of EGLD to send with deployment (in wei, will be scaled by 18 decimals).

inputs.name: Source Address
inputs.description: The address of the source contract to deploy from.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The smart contract deployment proposal is now awaiting signatures.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird
label.es: Recibe notificación cuando se firme esta propuesta
label.fr: Sois informé quand cette proposition est signée
label.ro: Fii notificat când această propunere este semnată
label.it: Ricevi notifica quando questa proposta viene firmata

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to deploy a smart contract
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} zur Bereitstellung eines Smart Contracts unterzeichnet
body.es: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to deploy a smart contract
body.fr: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to deploy a smart contract
body.ro: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to deploy a smart contract
body.it: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to deploy a smart contract
